creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
pawel       2012-03-29 21:39:26 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    multimedia           Makefile 
  Added files:
    multimedia/bino      Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  Bino is a video player with the following main features:
  Support for stereoscopic 3D video, with a wide variety of input and output
  formats.
  Support for multi-display video, e.g. for powerwalls, Virtual Reality
  installations and other multi-projector setups.
  
  WWW:    http://bino3d.org/
  
  PR:             ports/166389
  Submitted by:   Mykola Dzham <i@levsha.me>
  Feature safe:   yes
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.482     +1 -0      ports/multimedia/Makefile
  1.1       +50 -0     ports/multimedia/bino/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +2 -0      ports/multimedia/bino/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +7 -0      ports/multimedia/bino/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +61 -0     ports/multimedia/bino/pkg-plist (new)
